findings.evidence: `code/.../SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:55` defines `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient H b := MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient H (p ⁻¹' {b})`; `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/Quotient.lean:357` provides `noncomputable def equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup ... : orbitRel.Quotient H X ≃ G ⧸ H`; the new body at `code/.../SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:73` is exactly `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup e H`.
findings.fix: Remove this declaration and use `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup e H` directly; keep only any genuinely deck-specific lemmas that cannot be stated over the existing equivalence.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitQuotientEquivQuotientGroup` directly duplicates `MulAction.equivSubgroupOrbitsQuotientGroup` with `G := Deck p` and `X := p ⁻¹' {b}`.

summary: The new main deck equivalence is only a renamed specialization of an existing Mathlib equivalence, so the PR adds parallel API instead of reusing it directly.
